use_cases: Initial page load splash screen for websites and apps
Welcome experience with international greetings for global audiences
Loading state indicator during data fetching operations
Brand introduction moment during app startup
Transition overlay before main content reveal
ai_summary: An animated preloader component featuring cycling international greeting text with a curved SVG path reveal and smooth slide-up exit animation. Built with Framer Motion for sophisticated motion design, this component cycles through 8 language greetings before gracefully exiting and triggering an onComplete callback. Perfect for creating polished loading experiences and splash screen moments.
